mermaid_diagram:
graph TD
  subgraph API[API Layer]
    repobrain_ui_app_py[app]
    repobrain_cli___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_cli_main_py[main]
    repobrain_src_llm_ollama_client_py[ollama_client]
    repobrain_src_llm_openai_client_py[openai_client]
    repobrain_src_summarizer_flow_mapper_py[flow_mapper]
  end
  subgraph Service[Service Layer]
    repobrain_src_effort_effort_estimator_py[effort_estimator]
    repobrain_src_effort___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_architecture_analyzer_py[analyzer]
    repobrain_src_summarizer___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_summarizer_summarizer_py[summarizer]
    repobrain_src_impact_impact_analyzer_py[impact_analyzer]
    repobrain_src_impact___init___py[__init__]
  end
  subgraph Parser[Parser Layer]
    repobrain_tests_test_parser_py[test_parser]
    repobrain_tests_test_scanner_py[test_scanner]
    repobrain_src_parser___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_parser_parser_py[parser]
    repobrain_src_scanner_scanner_py[scanner]
    repobrain_src_scanner___init___py[__init__]
  end
  subgraph Graph[Graph Layer]
    repobrain_tests_test_graph_py[test_graph]
    repobrain_src_graph___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_graph_graph_builder_py[graph_builder]
  end
  subgraph AI[AI Layer]
    repobrain___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_ui___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_config_config_py[config]
    repobrain_config___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_tests___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_llm___init___py[__init__]
    repobrain_src_llm_rag_py[rag]
    repobrain_src_llm_base_py[base]
    repobrain_src_architecture___init___py[__init__]
  end
  API --> Service
  Service --> Parser
  Parser --> Graph
  Graph --> AI
